title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 14 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 14 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 14 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 14/09/2021
According to data tracked by SMM, 76 ships arrived at domestic main ports during September 6-13. Arrivals of cargoes are estimated to stand at12.56 million mt, up 3.08 million mt from the previous week, but down 2.08 million mt year on year. Shipments that departed Australian ports were estimated to increase 210,000 mt week on week and 1.45 million mt on the year to 17.47 million mt, and that from Brazilian ports decreased 250,000 mt on the week and 2.8 million mt to 5.87 million mt on the year.
